title: rhume #4505
definition:
1) a swing, rush, force, trail, of a body in motion
 2) a tract of way in a town shut in by buildings on both sides
 3) a street, a lane
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) a swing, rush, force, trail, of a body in motion
 2) a tract of way in a town shut in by buildings on both sides
 3) a street, a lane

    NASB:  the rush (of a moving body), hence a (crowded) street:
